'''Volu Nyth''' was a [[Kuat/Legends|Kuati]] pilot who joined [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|siege of Borleias]] and flew in that series of battles.<ref name="Rebel Dream" /> After the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], she retired from military service; during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] recruited her into [[Rakehell Squadron]], an independent unit supporting [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]] faction. There, she flew in the raid on the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']], coming up against her former unit while providing cover.<ref name="Fury" />
